issue_title: Fix missing translations in Settings/Shortcuts modal
issue_body_preview:
### Description

Fixed translation loading for the Settings/Shortcuts modal. Some items were failing to pull from commons.json. No new strings were added to the translation file, so any missing keys will still need to be addressed.
test_description_zh: 打开应用首页，点击设置或快捷键按钮打开 Settings/Shortcuts 弹窗，检查弹窗中各文本项（标签、按钮、描述等）是否正确显示为当前语言的翻译内容，切换不同语言后再次打开弹窗观察翻译是否完整。
expected_result_zh: Settings/Shortcuts 弹窗中的所有文本项应正确显示对应语言的翻译内容，不应出现翻译键名（如 commons.xxx）或空白文本，切换语言后弹窗内容应同步更新为对应语言。
